versions.version_description: I find this to be more correct than the one other five-star submission on the site.

Christmas song guitar chords never match the melody. So after years of making a mess of this song, I pulled the vocal sheet music and matched the melody to real guitar chords. I think you'll find this version very satisfiing and more fun to play.
This tab has more precise chords and has a jazzy, bouncy feel.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Jingle Bell Rock chords
Bobby Helms 1957 (Joseph Carleton Beal / James Ross Boothe)**

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jingle_Bell_Rock *

[Intro]

[ch]D[/ch]

[tab]e|---------|
B|---------|
G|---------|
D|---------|
A|-0-------|
E|--3-2-0--|[/tab]

[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]        [ch]D6[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
Jingle bell, jingle bell, jingle bell rock,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D6[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]A7[/ch]
jingle bells swing and jingle bells ring.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]A7[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]A7[/ch]
Snowing and blowing up bushels of fun,[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]A7[/ch]

[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]        [ch]D6[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
Jingle bell, jingle bell, jingle bell rock,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D6[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]A7[/ch]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]A7[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]A7[/ch]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]D7[/ch]

[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Gm[/ch]

[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]D7[/ch]

[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]E7[/ch]
Jingle bell time is a swell time,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]A7[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]A7[/ch]
to go gliding in a one-horse sleigh.[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]         [ch]D6[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Gm[/ch]            [ch]E7[/ch]       [ch]Gm[/ch]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]A7[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
that's the jingle bell rock.[/tab]

[Verse 4]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]        [ch]D6[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
Jingle bell, jingle bell, jingle bell rock,[/tab]

jingle bells chime in jingle bell time.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]A7[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]A7[/ch]
Dancing and prancing in Jingle Bell Square,[/tab]

 in the frosty air.[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Gm[/ch]
What a bright time, it's the right time,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]D7[/ch]
to rock the night away.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]E7[/ch]
Jingle bell time is a swell time,[/tab]

that's the jingle bell,[/tab]

that's the jingle bell,         [/tab]
